_comment: Claude Code settings template by MarsDevs (www.marsdevs.com)

hooks.command:
# TODO: Uncomment and adjust for your formatter:
# npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"
# ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"
# gofmt -w "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"
echo '[hook] Auto-format: configure your formatter in .claude/settings.json'

# Block edits to lock files and generated code
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock\.yaml|\.generated\.|/generated/)'; then
  echo 'BLOCKED: This file should not be edited directly by Claude.'
  exit 1
fi
